results.route_decision: Complex fabric (Smooth, lustrous knit fabric with a satin-like sheen for the body and sleeves. The collar, cuffs, and hem are made of a matte, ribbed knit.) — Gemini Pro best at material physics
issues: Unauthorized gold SR monogram placed on the front chest — SR is permitted only at the back-neck.
Front Black Rose art is wrong: a single rose silhouette instead of the canonical three-rose cluster with stems, thorny vines, and cloud.
Front logo reads as a flat tonal graphic rather than physically embossed/debossed fabric relief.
Back-neck gold SR embroidery is not verified in the render; the only SR present is the incorrectly placed front one.
Front carries an unauthorized lettermark ('SR') functioning as prohibited front-chest text/logo.

results.route_decision: Standard garment — FLUX Pro best value (98% quality, 26% cost)
issues: Zipper-front closure rendered instead of the required full-length body-tone snap/button placket (explicit NEGATIVE spec violation).
Hallucinated red rose cluster on the front-right chest — front must show only the embroidered Love/Hurts wordmark; rose/heart art belongs on the back only.
Front wordmark is generic script and does not match the canonical Love Hurts hand-drawn graffiti-cursive embroidery.
No visible snap/button hardware on the placket; closure construction is unverifiable.
Front slash welt pockets are not clearly resolved as the specified vertical welt openings.
